rulings.Case Title: ANTONIO MOLINAR VS. MARCIA BROWNE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion To Disqualify Deft Counsel
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, February 6, 2009, line 11, PLAINTIFF ANTONIO MOLINAR'S Motion To Disqualify Defendant's Counsel. Motion is denied. Failure to maintain evidentiary burden. Defendant's request for sanctions is denied because CCP section 128.5 is inapplicable to this action. See CCP section 128.5(b)(1). =(302/CWW/PB)

rulings.Case Title: NORMA GREAVER VS. ERIN DOYLE EBELING et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Issuance Of Preliminary Injunction.
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, February 6, 2009, line 12, PLAINTIFF NORMA GREAVER'S Motion For Issuance Of Preliminary Injunction. The motion for preliminary injunction is Denied. Plaintiff fails to establish a reasonable probability of prevailing on the merits. Plaintiff merely alleges that decedent agreed to care for her. Insufficient evidence that she is entitled to any trust property. Plaintiff fails to establish irreparable harm, or that money damages are inadequate. =(302/CWW/JW)
